Container.Name: caddy
Container.Overview: Dedicated public edge for the self-hosted PR-agent. Maintains the pr-agent A record in a Porkbun-hosted DNS zone, obtains and renews its own certificate through DNS-01, and proxies HTTPS traffic to the private pr-agent container. Requires the pre-created pr-agent-net Docker network and a domain-scoped Porkbun API key.
Container.Description: Caddy edge proxy for PR-agent. The public URL is https://pr-agent.PORKBUN_ZONE/. Forward router TCP 80 to host port 18080 and TCP 443 to host port 18443. Never forward PR-agent port 3000 or Caddy admin port 2019.

Config.Name: Porkbun DNS zone
Config.Description: Purchased registrable domain hosted on Porkbun nameservers, for example example.net. Enter only the zone; Caddy publishes pr-agent.example.net.

Config.Name: Porkbun API key
Config.Description: Dedicated Porkbun API key restricted to this domain. Enable API Access for the domain. Do not restrict the key by source IP because the WAN address changes.

Config.Name: Porkbun API secret key
Config.Description: One-time secret for the dedicated domain-scoped Porkbun API key. Keep it only in this masked field.

Config.Name: ACME account email
Config.Description: Email used for Caddy's ACME account and certificate-expiry notices.

Config.Name: Caddyfile
Config.Description: Copy deploy/Caddyfile from this repository here. Mounted read-only.

Config.Name: Caddy data
Config.Description: Persistent ACME accounts, certificates, and private keys. Back up and protect this directory.

Config.Name: HTTP host port
Config.Description: Router target for public TCP 80. Keep 18080 unless another Unraid service uses it.

Config.Name: HTTPS host port
Config.Description: Router target for public TCP 443. Keep 18443 unless another Unraid service uses it.
